auto_repair_attempts.attempt: verify both Telegram bot tokens with getMe
discover historical Telegram chats via getUpdates
auto_repair_attempts.result: no group/channel/private OPS chat updates available

auto_repair_attempts.attempt: probe @al_hermoine_ops_bot as chat target from main bot
probe @al_hermoine_ops_bot as chat target from ops bot

notes: No alias was fabricated and no fallback/default/home/DM delivery was used.
required_external_action: Create or choose a real Telegram destination for ops notifications: a group/supergroup/channel or a user DM that has started the ops bot.
Add the ops bot al_hermoine_ops_bot to that destination and send at least one message/mention there so Hermes can discover it, or provide the destination as an explicit Telegram target out of band.
Then add a channel-directory entry named AL-Hermoine-OPS pointing to that real chat, not to the bot username and not to Marius DM; restart/rebuild Hermes gateway; rerun one explicit live test.
root_cause: Hermes channel_directory is built from session history for Telegram; only the Marius DM session exists in default and ops-bot profiles.
The string AL-Hermoine-OPS refers to the ops Telegram bot identity/username, not a Telegram chat/channel that a bot can send to.
Telegram Bot API forbids bot-to-bot messages, so @al_hermoine_ops_bot cannot be used as a delivery chat target.
